nadimpalli_satyanarayana_raju_institute_.overview: Nadimpalli Satyanarayana Raju Institute of Technology (NSRIT), located on the Pendurthi-Anandapuram Highway in Sontyam, Visakhapatnam, Andhra Pradesh, is a prominent private engineering college established in 2008. Originally affiliated with JNTU Kakinada, the institution is currently affiliated with JNTU Gurajada Vizianagaram (JNTU-GV) and approved by the AICTE. The college is recognized for its technical depth, offering industry-centric engineering, computer application, and business programs on a modern campus focused on hands-on technical learning and real-world implementation.
nadimpalli_satyanarayana_raju_institute_.accreditation: Approved by AICTE; Affiliated with JNTU Gurajada Vizianagaram (JNTU-GV); NAAC accredited.

coursesAndFees.tuitionFee: ₹43,000 per year. Total course fee is approximately ₹1,60,000 to ₹1,72,000.

placements.highestSalary: ₹9.00 LPA (Secured by multiple students across tech streams)
placements.placementRate: Overall eligibility placement percentage is around 85% to 92%
placements.totalOffers: 300+ students successfully placed during recent campus drives
placements.companiesVisited: TCS, Wipro, Infosys, HCL, Cognizant, IBM, Genpact, Amazon, Adobe
placements.internshipHighlights: Industry-connect upskilling and practical field-training partnerships integrated with standard curriculum paths

admissions.admissionProcess: Undergraduate B.Tech admissions are majorly based on state-level AP EAPCET counseling (Category A) or through management quotas (Category B). PG admissions rely on AP ICET (MBA/MCA) and AP PGECET/GATE scores.
admissions.importantDates: Admissions systematically align with APSCHE guidelines and state-level counseling schedules for AP EAPCET, ICET, and PGECET.

campus.specialNote: Hostel accommodations focus closely on assisting outstation students. Allotment relies primarily on availability and distance from hometowns.

hostelFees.4SharingAC: ₹65,000 - ₹70,000 per year (Estimated inclusive of AC facilities and mess bills)
hostelFees.5SharingNonAC: ₹50,000 per year (Affordable Multi-sharing base variant inclusive of mess charges)

contact.address: Nadimpalli Satyanarayana Raju Institute of Technology, Sontyam, Pendurthi-Anandapuram Highway, Visakhapatnam, Andhra Pradesh - 531173, India

scholarships.meritScholarships: Institution and college-level financial aid rewards offered based on academic performance and competitive rank scores.
scholarships.fullWaiver: 100% tuition fee reimbursement through the Andhra Pradesh Jagananna Amma Vodi / Vidya Deevena schemes for eligible students admitted via EAPCET counseling.
scholarships.partialWaiver: Concessions extended under special institutional merit brackets for national and state exam high achievers.
scholarships.governmentAid: Full post-matric scholarship schemes and tuition reimbursements available for SC, ST, BC, EBC, and Kapu community students under standard state welfare rules.
